transformationMoves: Replace essayed comparison with world-bound props already in the active beat.
Swap explained emotion for bodily pressure, object contact, or terrain-facing judgment.
Let storage, lane position, and horse-work carry relationship turns instead of thematic summary.
Keep dialogue grounded by giving nearby hands, tack, paper, wind, and posture real work.
When a line risks portable imagery, translate it into setting-native bodily or infrastructural signal.

scenes.title: The Camp
scenes.biggestGap: One comparison line lifts out of the crate-table moment instead of staying in paper, thumb, and road logic.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Field camp south of Stratholme with smoke over stripped birch and the north road latent in the map.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Jaina's marked papers, the crate table, and the map case strap must keep the inference exchange physical.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads route value, institutional delay, and whether south is still a job.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Finger movement over roads, paper pinned to wood, and fire pause stop the map talk from floating.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The map gets packed under real camp wind and the first colder edge from the north.

scenes.title: The Sister
scenes.biggestGap: Two strong confrontation beats drift into explained anger and policy-summary language instead of staying pinned to vellum, bracer, smoke, and the listening camp.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: The confrontation remains in a working camp with horse line, escorts, and Stratholme's stain still on the horizon.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Recall vellum, wax seal, Sylvanas's bracer, and the mare's blown chest carry the wound physically.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads tactic, family pressure, and institutional cowardice through objects and bodies first.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Hands on the recall, Cyndia on the horse, Jaina holding the map case, and camp stillness keep the scene embodied.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The refusal must leave the recall physically unanswered and ready to ride home.

scenes.title: The Parallel Severance
scenes.biggestGap: Jaina's stone gesture is already strong, but the interpretive tail should stay bodily instead of translating the action for the reader.

geography: first birches beyond the fire line

sceneContract.placeAnchor: The call happens at the birch edge while Vereesa's departure forms on the relay road out.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Amber stone-light, coat cloth, folded recall, saddle leather, and dust keep the severance bodily.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas gets posture, timing, and storage gesture only; anything more remains inference.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Observation beats around the stone and horse departure frame the quieter exchange with Vereesa.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Vereesa riding away with the recall and Jaina pocketing the dead stone should seal cost without explanation.

scenes.title: The Road North
scenes.biggestGap: Two late lines summarize partnership and resonance instead of letting lane geometry, saddle shock, and bodily signal carry the work.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: The coast road has to change under them from interior track to harsher harbor approach country.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Girth, saddle soreness, lane position, relay hardware, salt, and horse breath keep the final third tangible.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads file order, horse handling, relay reach, and Jaina's body as operational facts.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Short road talk stays tied to ruts, rein work, and the wind over the riders.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The chapter ends on coast, failing relays, borrowed passage, and colder north instead of abstract resolve.
